title: Supply & Demand
tagline: Nobody set the price — it found itself.
description: Drag prices, trigger shocks, and impose ceilings and floors on a toy coffee market. Five short acts from 'what is demand?' to 'why do price controls cause shortages?'

title: Price Signals & the Calculation Problem
tagline: Run the economy yourself — first as a market, then as a planner.
description: A toy economy of six linked goods. Watch prices carry news of a drought in market mode, then freeze prices and try to plan your way through the same shock by hand.

title: Comparative Advantage
description: Why both sides win from trade even when one is better at everything.

title: Inflation & the Money Supply
description: The quantity theory of money, from Fisher's equation to Friedman's famous line.

title: The Multiplier
tagline: One person's spending is another's income.
description: How a burst of spending ripples through an economy — and when it doesn't.
